checkpoint: verified repository cleanup checkpoint prepared for commit with the active feature still in progress
scope: Desktop composition, desktop adapter layout, frontend platform, development-runtime, and root-script cutovers
observed_implementation: jobsentinel-application constructs configuration, storage, credentials, scheduler, and browser-import services for desktop startup.
The desktop adapter is split into bootstrap, desktop behavior, IPC, and policy owners; retired app, command handler, and commands paths are contractually forbidden.
Every production renderer import of desktop command, event, and notification APIs routes through thin entrypoints under src/platform/tauri.
The central mock registry, mock state, notification mock commands, development-only vitals, and environment-gated loader are owned by src/dev-runtime.
All 12 feature-owned mock directories moved under src/dev-runtime/features, and the frontend boundary recursively rejects new src/features mock directories.
Production code cannot import test support, and development-runtime loading is restricted to an explicit development-gated dynamic import.

All 24 former root-level scripts moved under declared checks, dev, harness, or release owners with no compatibility wrappers; package commands, launchers, workflows, maintained docs, and tests use the final paths.
The repository topology contract rejects future root-level scripts and undeclared script owner directories.

The source duplication ratchet fell from 810 lines across 40 regions to 778 lines across 38 regions; the non-production development runtime is excluded consistently with the former mock-directory policy.

verification.result: The path-sensitive browser import script test passed after reading the command from its new IPC owner.

Harness, architecture, security, dependency, SQLx, duplication, documentation, type, lint, 815 script tests, 2,933 frontend tests, and production and Storybook builds passed. The runtime smoke budget exposed a stale Playwright CLI path after the script-owner cutover; focused tests, the corrected runtime lane, and the remaining Rust lane passed separately.
Generated production, Storybook, and runtime-test outputs were removed after verification.
The duplication contract was ratcheted down to 778 duplicated lines across 38 regions.
The planner selected the full repository, frontend, runtime, architecture, security, and Rust verification lanes for the cutover.
All 202 relocated development-runtime tests across 32 files passed.
All 816 script and harness contract tests passed, including the production platform, feature mock-directory, script-owner topology, and Playwright CLI path regressions.
All 15 focused development-script tests passed after both Playwright callers were routed through the repository-root CLI path helper.
All 10 runtime smoke tests passed within the 30-second budget with no unexpected, flaky, or skipped tests.
Rust formatting, Clippy with warnings denied, workspace tests, and documentation tests passed.
Strict TypeScript checking passed after all feature simulators moved.
Frontend lint passed after all feature simulators moved.
All 2,933 frontend tests across 213 files passed after feature simulators moved to the development-runtime owner.
The production frontend build passed with platform-owned desktop APIs and no production dependency on development-runtime code.
Canonical state, architecture, hosted-workflow policy, and file-size coverage passed.
Frontend ownership boundaries and the repository architecture contract passed.
Hard source limits passed; the path-sensitive product-copy test remained below its no-growth byte ceiling.
The repository bloat and maintained-path checks passed.
Production duplication remained at the 778-line, 38-region baseline.
The canonical initializer used the relocated harness and development owners, passed environment diagnosis, the harness contract, and the three-test application startup smoke.
Release workflows passed action pin validation after the package-manager pin helper moved under the harness owner.

runtime_warnings: The host ran Node.js 26.5.0 instead of the .nvmrc-owned 24.18.0 baseline.
The host ran npm 11.17.0 instead of the package.json-owned 12.0.1 baseline.
remaining_implementation: Flat script tests still need directories that mirror their script owners.
Remaining structural debt and exceptions still require cleanup.
The final whole-repository audit and active feature transition have not occurred.
